arts.ttl: Ally McCoist 'can't believe' what he saw during Real Madrid vs Arsenal as pundit left gobsmacked
arts.sum: The Rangers legend watched on in disbelief from the commentary box at the Bernabeu

arts.ttl: Arsenal leave Chelsea stunned after Moises Caicedo transfer demand
arts.sum: Arsenal have entered the race for Chelsea target Joel Ordonez, according to a report. According to Just Arsenal, the Gunners have now entered the race to sign Ordonez as they look to add a young defender to their ranks.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand questions Bukayo Saka's 'cheeky' decision to try a Panenka after Arsenal star had penalty saved by Thibaut Courtois
arts.sum: The Arsenal maestro has been their go-to star for a number of seasons now, and despite a long-term injury lay-off this term has been their key performer in the Champions League .

arts.ttl: UEFA explain Real Madrid penalty being overturned vs Arsenal
arts.sum: UEFA have on Wednesday provided an explanation for the decision to overturn Real Madrid’s penalty kick against Arsenal. Ongoings in tonight’s Champions League clash at the Santiago Bernabéu have of…

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans all sing from same hymn sheet after Bukayo Saka's penalty vs Real Madrid
arts.sum: Arsenal saw Bukayo Saka miss an early penalty at Real Madrid as the winger attempted an audacious chipped effort - only to see Thibaut Courtois save it to ignite the Bernabeu

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham joins Real Madrid legend in UCL history books vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Jude Bellingham has on Wednesday continued to etch his name ever further into the history books of European football. Real Madrid are of course currently locked in…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid taunt Arsenal on social media before Champions League showdown
arts.sum: The mind games between Real Madrid and Arsenal are well under way before a ball is even kicked at the Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Sergio Ramos sends message to Real Madrid ahead of Arsenal showdown
arts.sum: Former Real Madrid star Sergio Ramos has on Wednesday evening sent a message of encouragement the way of his ex-employers and teammates. This, of course, comes ahead of a potentially…

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins transfer prediction made after £40m Arsenal interest and Aston Villa snub
arts.sum: Danny Murphy believes 'there will be takers' for Ollie Watkins if he hands in a transfer request at Aston Villa. The 29-year-old is still a Villa Park favourite after coming to the club from the Championship and firing them into the Champions League, but even star power was not enough to see him start Tuesday's quarter final second leg against Paris Saint-Germain .

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans create chant mocking Tottenham hours before Real Madrid showdown
arts.sum: Arsenal fans have descended on the Spanish capital ahead of their Champions League quarter-final clash with Real Madrid as they chant about Tottenham's current predicament
